race.comment: DISCO PRINCE (1) was back in winning form last time with a dominant 4L win over 2000m at Mudgee. Up in the weights but a top chance again. ROCK THE MACHINE (4) was a gutsy winner last time over 1815m at Port Macquarie, scoring by 2L to make it two wins in a row. Great chance to extend the sequence. ATTACK FORCE (2) is a fellow last start winner, arriving just in time to shed his maiden tag at Toowoomba. Full of confidence now and deserves respect. LIBBY (7) finds it tough to notch up her second win but is knocking on the door. Lacks early speed but can give them a scare late if they overcook it in front.
